name: dmitriy-claude
description: Personal Claude Code marketplace: Kotlin/Spring methodology, clean-code, Spring stack, DDD, testing, architecture, and custom subagents — split into granular plugins so only the ones you need consume context.

plugins.name: methodology
plugins.description: Always-on coding discipline: think before coding, ask when underspecified, verify before claiming done, debug from root cause.

plugins.name: clean-code
plugins.description: Clean Code router + per-topic siblings for Kotlin/Spring: naming, functions, classes, comments, formatting, error handling, boundaries, objects vs data, systems.

plugins.name: spring
plugins.description: Spring Boot 3+ / Kotlin: beans, AOP, events, transactions, validation, Web MVC, security, caching, RabbitMQ messaging, Boot mastery.

plugins.name: ddd
plugins.description: Domain-Driven Design: strategic, context-mapping, tactical patterns, and the DDD router for Kotlin/Spring.

plugins.name: test
plugins.description: Testing discipline: strategy, principles, unit, integration, acceptance, contract, architecture fitness, mutation testing.

plugins.name: architecture
plugins.description: Architecture & design: decision-making, ADRs, layout patterns, SOLID/GRASP/GoF, microservices, API/DB design, CQRS, JVM perf, algorithms, architect review.

plugins.name: agents
plugins.description: Custom subagents: architect, architecture-reviewer, code-implementor, code-reviewer, security-reviewer, test-architect, test-implementor, test-reviewer, troubleshooter.
